content.body:
Defines the formal contract between L.E.O. and agent runtimes.
Includes event definitions (session.start/end, turn.complete,
compact/clear.triggered), dual-output capture payload shape,
adapter capability declaration format, and compatibility matrix.
Stored under .github/mrp/ (tracked, project-wide meta).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(mrp): add MRP v0 spec doc and JSON schemas
